config.shadow.title: Shadow Settings
config.shadow.enable-dynamic.name: Enable Dynamic Shadow
config.shadow.enable-dynamic.tooltip: Enable shadows that change angle and length based on time of day
config.shadow.gradient-start.name: Shadow Gradient Start Opacity
config.shadow.gradient-start.tooltip: Opacity at the base of shadow (0-1)
config.shadow.gradient-end.name: Shadow Gradient End Opacity
config.shadow.gradient-end.tooltip: Opacity at the tip of shadow (0-1)
config.shadow.edge-blur.name: Shadow Edge Blur Intensity
config.shadow.edge-blur.tooltip: Amount of blur applied to shadow edges
config.shadow.max-shear-angle.name: Maximum Shear Angle
config.shadow.enable-simple.name: Enable Small Farm Item Shadow
config.shadow.enable-simple.tooltip: Render shadows for small objects (weeds, stones, debris, etc.)
config.tiltshift.title: Tilt-Shift Effect Settings
config.tiltshift.enable.name: Enable Tilt-Shift Effect
config.tiltshift.outdoor-only.name: Outdoor Only
config.tiltshift.outdoor-only.tooltip: Apply tilt-shift effect only in outdoor locations
config.tiltshift.focus-center.name: Focus Center Position
config.tiltshift.focus-center.tooltip: Vertical position of the focus point on screen (0=top, 1=bottom)
config.tiltshift.blur-strength.name: Blur Strength
config.tiltshift.blur-strength.tooltip: Intensity of the tilt-shift blur effect
config.tiltshift.top-blur-range.name: Top Blur Range Ratio
config.tiltshift.top-blur-range.tooltip: Range ratio of the blur zone at the top of the screen
config.tiltshift.bottom-blur-range.name: Bottom Blur Range Ratio
config.tiltshift.bottom-blur-range.toolt: Range ratio of the blur zone at the bottom of the screen
